import heapq


def get_top_5_scores(scores: list[int]) -> list[int]:
    return heapq.nlargest(5, scores)


def get_lowest_3_prices(prices: list[float]) -> list[float]:
    return heapq.nsmallest(3, prices)


def get_top_10_recent_orders(orders: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    return heapq.nlargest(10, orders, key=lambda o: o["created_at"])


def get_best_performers(employees: list[dict], n: int = 5) -> list[dict]:
    return heapq.nlargest(n, employees, key=lambda e: e["rating"])


def get_smallest_5_measurements(measurements: list[float]) -> list[float]:
    return heapq.nsmallest(5, measurements)
